scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:patient" "npm run start:doctor" "npm run start:appointment" "npm run start:prescription" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../patient-service && npm install && cd ../doctor-service && npm install && cd ../appointment-service && npm install && cd ../prescription-service && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
